Korean headline (deep navy with '얼굴을 긁을 수 있어요' highlighted in mustard #D4A84A marker): '신생아는 손을 흔들다가 / 얼굴을 긁을 수 있어요'. IMPORTANT: render Korean words exactly as written, no arbitrary splitting. Korean headline (deep navy with '잠들었을 때' highlighted in mustard #D4A84A marker): '아기가 잠들었을 때가 / 가장 안전해요'. IMPORTANT: render Korean words exactly as written, no arbitrary splitting. Korean headline (deep navy with '둥근 끝 아기 전용' highlighted in mustard #D4A84A marker): '둥근 끝 아기 전용 / 도구만 사용하세요'. IMPORTANT: render Korean words exactly as written, no arbitrary splitting. Each with small gray label. Hand-drawn coral #C44536 outlined warning box bottom: '⚠️ 성인용 손톱깎이 절대 금지' in coral bold, thin hand-drawn border with corner × marks. Portrait 1080x1350. Hand-drawn notebook style. Grid-pattern beige background #F5F0E5 with subtle square grid lines. Top-left small label: 'STEP 03 · TECHNIQUE' in muted gray. Korean headline (deep navy with '살을 눌러 공간 확보' highlighted in mustard #D4A84A marker): '손가락 끝 살을 눌러 / 공간 확보 후 자르기'. IMPORTANT: render Korean words exactly as written, no arbitrary splitting. Below two hand-drawn boxes with gray text: '손톱 → 둥글게 곡선 따라' and '발톱 → 일자로 (내향성 예방)'. Top-right: 소아과언니 (exactly 4 characters only, no quotes).

Portrait 1080x1350. Hand-drawn notebook style. Grid-pattern beige background #F5F0E5 with subtle square grid lines. Top-left small label: 'STEP 04 · DON'T' in muted gray. Korean headline (deep navy with '절대 하지 마세요' highlighted in mustard #D4A84A marker): '이것만은 / 절대 하지 마세요'. IMPORTANT: render Korean words exactly as written, no arbitrary splitting. Two hand-drawn coral #C44536 outlined warning boxes stacked vertically, thin border with corner × marks: First box '⚠️ 입으로 물어뜯기 금지 (세균 감염 위험)' in coral bold. Portrait 1080x1350. Hand-drawn notebook style. Grid-pattern beige background #F5F0E5 with subtle square grid lines. Top-left small label: 'EMERGENCY · 실수했을 때' in muted gray. Korean headline (deep navy with '멸균 거즈로 압박' highlighted in mustard #D4A84A marker): '피부를 베었다면 / 멸균 거즈로 압박하세요'. IMPORTANT: render Korean words exactly as written, no arbitrary splitting. Visual center: hand-drawn line illustration of sterile gauze pad gently pressing on baby finger, simple black ink line art, soft pressure indication, no color fills. Hand-drawn coral #C44536 outlined warning box below, thin border with corner × marks: '⚠️ 반창고 사용 금지 (질식 위험)' in coral bold. Small gray caption: '부드럽게 지혈 후 자연 회복'. Top-right: 소아과언니 (exactly 4 characters only, no quotes).

Portrait 1080x1350. Hand-drawn notebook style. Grid-pattern beige background #F5F0E5 with subtle square grid lines. Top-left small label: 'TIP · 손싸개 사용' in muted gray. Korean headline (deep navy with '제한적으로만' highlighted in mustard #D4A84A marker): '손싸개는 / 제한적으로만 사용하세요'. IMPORTANT: render Korean words exactly as written, no arbitrary splitting. Visual center: hand-drawn line illustration of baby mittens with dotted outline (indicating limited use), simple black ink line art, no color fills. Below two hand-drawn boxes with gray text: '✓ 필요시에만 단시간' and '✗ 수면 외 시간 자제 (손 탐색 발달 방해)'. Thin hand-drawn horizontal divider. Top-right: 소아과언니 (exactly 4 characters only, no quotes).

Portrait 1080x1350. Hand-drawn notebook style closing page. Grid-pattern beige background #F5F0E5 with subtle square grid lines. Top-left small label: 'SAVE & SHARE' in muted gray. Korean headline center (deep navy with '저장하세요' highlighted in mustard #D4A84A marker): '오늘 확인하고 / 저장하세요'. Source area: hand-drawn rectangle, thin black line border with small corner cross marks (×). 출처 in small navy bold, followed by gray smaller text list: · MedlinePlus Medical Encyclopedia (2025) · AAP HealthyChildren.org (2009, 2020) · Kaiser Permanente Health Encyclopedia (2026) · American Academy of Dermatology (2023). Horizontal hand-drawn thin divider. Brand block center: 소아과언니 (medium-bold large deep navy #1A1F36 — exactly 4 characters, NO pixel values, NO decoration). DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 (small caps gray). Hand-drawn thin horizontal divider. @dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 (gray). 소아과수첩 앱 · 성장 기록 (navy). Top-right: 소아과언니 (exactly 4 characters only, no quotes). ABSOLUTE RULE: never render numbers followed by 'px' anywhere on card.

common_style:
# 손그림 노트북 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 모눈종이 베이지 #F5F0E5
- 텍스트: deep navy #1A1F36
- 형광펜 강조: mustard #D4A84A (헤드라인 핵심 단어 하이라이트)
- 경고 액센트: coral #C44536 (의학 안전 경고만)
- 일러스트: 검정 펜 손그림 line art, 채색 없음
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 (따옴표 없이 4글자만)
- 픽셀값 텍스트 카드에 절대 금지

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Hand-drawn notebook style.
Grid-pattern beige background #F5F0E5 with subtle square grid lines.
Top-left small handwritten label: 'PARENTING NOTE · [번호]' in muted gray.
Korean headline (navy with '[핵심 단어]' highlighted in mustard #D4A84A marker style): '[헤드라인 첫 줄] / [헤드라인 둘째 줄]'.
Subtitle below (gray, smaller): '[부제]'.
Hand-drawn small illustration lower right: [토픽 관련 line art sketch], no color fills.
Top-right corner: 소아과언니 (4 characters only, no quotes).

## BODY 패턴 (slide n:2-8)
Hand-drawn notebook style.
Grid-pattern beige background #F5F0E5 with subtle square grid lines.
Top-left small label: '[STEP 번호 · 영문명]' in muted gray.
Korean headline (navy with '[강조 단어]' highlighted in mustard marker): '[헤드라인]'.
IMPORTANT: render Korean words exactly as written, no arbitrary splitting.
Visual: hand-drawn line illustration of [토픽 관련 장면], simple line art black ink, slightly rough strokes, no color fills.
Caption gray below: '[캡션]'.
Top-right: 소아과언니 (4 characters only, no quotes).

## 경고 박스 패턴
Coral #C44536 outlined hand-drawn rectangle with corner cross marks (×).
⚠️ icon + bold warning text in coral.

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Hand-drawn notebook style closing page.
Top-left small label: 'SAVE & SHARE' in muted gray.
Korean headline (navy with '저장하세요' highlighted in mustard marker).
Source area: hand-drawn rectangle, thin black line border with small corner cross marks.
